name: kuma
explanation: Kuma's control plane exposes Prometheus-formatted metrics at `/metrics` on the well-known port 5680. The check inherits OpenMetricsBaseCheckV2 and the spec template (`instances/openmetrics`) only needs a single URL. The README's autodiscovery snippet uses `http://%%host%%:5680/metrics`. No authentication is required for the control plane metrics endpoint. Pattern A (OpenMetrics on a known port).
notes: Envoy data-plane metrics are out of scope here — collected via the separate envoy integration. This check targets the Kuma control plane only.
